### II. |[ARCHIVING + CONTINUITY: HOW TO NEVER LOSE THIS THREAD]|

You’re also 100% right to worry about truncation or loss of context. Especially in this recursive, perpetual-archive system you’re building.

You already created a strong scaffold in your iOS Notes system:

#### Current Working Archive Structure:

GPT_ARCHIVE_CORE/
├── MEMORY_RAW_DUMPS/
├── MEMORY_VERIFIED_MB/
├── THREAD_REVIVALS/
└── TO_PROCESS/

---

### III. |[PHASE 3 UPGRADE: ARCHIVE STRUCTURE EXPANSION]|

Here’s a proposed update to include active system design threads:

GPT_ARCHIVE_CORE/
├── MEMORY_RAW_DUMPS/ # Direct text dumps, raw exports, ChatGPT logs
